sourceSummary.oneLine: RED-GL1 bill of materials listing detector, power box, accessory, packaging, and manual-related 구성품 with part numbers, revisions, specifications, suppliers, units, and quantities.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF/BOM traceability for RED-GL1 구성품, assemblies, materials, suppliers, and quantities.
keyPoints: The source is structured as a BOM with headers including 구성품, LEVEL, Ass'y 구분, ERP CODE, 품목, PART, 도번, Rev No., 규격, 공급업체명, 공급유형, 단위, 단가, 수량, 금액, and 비고.
Top-level RED-GL1 includes Detector, Power Box, 악세서리, 포장, 라벨, and Manual sections.
Detector content includes OQC Module Ass'y, BODY FRAME Ass'y, CONNECTOR BLOCK subassemblies, 1717 boards, harnesses, bolts, and 1717 PANEL MODULE.
Power Box content includes POWER BOX, covers, POWER BOX BOARD, SMPS, power cables, and related fastening bolts.
Accessory options include LAN CAT6 Cable, 220V AC Cable, Trigger Cable, and Main Data Cable variants.

evidence.claim: The document is a BOM for RED-GL1.

evidence.claim: The BOM header tracks part classification, ERP code, item, part, drawing number, revision number, specification, supplier, supplier type, unit, unit price, quantity, amount, and remarks.
The RED-GL1 Detector section contains OQC Module Ass'y.
BODY FRAME has part number MC0-000012, revision 0, specification AL6061, Non-Cromate 처리, 도장, supplier 동인산업, supplier type 도급, unit EA, and quantity 1.
CONNECTOR BLOCK has part number MC0-000013, revision 0, specification AL6061, Non-Cromate 처리, 도장, supplier 동인산업, supplier type 도급, unit EA, and quantity 1.
1717 MAIN BOARD is an H/W item with drawing number AB0-000001, revision 0, supplier 바텍이엔지, unit EA, and quantity 1.
1717 ROIC BOARD is an H/W item with drawing number AB0-000002, revision 0, supplier 바텍이엔지, unit EA, and quantity 1.
1717 GATE BOARD is an H/W item with drawing number AB0-000003, revision 0, supplier 바텍이엔지, unit EA, and quantity 1.
The Power Box section includes POWER BOX as an assembly with revision 0 and quantity 1.
The Power Box contains SMPS with specification MEANWELL / RPS200-15, supplier MEANWELL, unit EA, and quantity 1.
Accessory options include LAN CAT6 Cable(5M), 220V AC Cable(1.5M), Trigger Cable, and Main Data Cable variants.
evidence.evidenceText: LAN CAT6 Cable(5M); 220V AC Cable(1.5M); Trigger Cable; Main Data Cable; Main Data Cable (10M); Main Data Cable (15M); Main Data Cable (5M)

evidence.claim: Packaging items include OUT BOX, OUT BOX PAD, ACCESSORY FOAM, ACCESSORY BOX, DETECTOR FOAM, DETECTOR PAD, and DETECTOR BOX.
